name: Herbed Pizza Dough
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup all-purpose flour (for working the dough)
1 tablespoon mixed herbs for pizza (oregano, parsley, etc.)
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve the yeast in the warm water until foamy (about 10 minutes).
2. Add the dissolved yeast mixture to a mixer bowl.
3. Incorporate salt, mixed herbs, and chopped sun-dried tomatoes into the yeast mixture.
4. Gradually add bread flour and all-purpose flour to the mixer bowl on low speed.
5. Knead until a dough ball forms and rises up the hook (about 5 minutes).
6. Lightly spray a bowl with cooking spray.
7. Place the dough in the prepared bowl and cover it.
8. Let the dough rise at room temperature for 1-2 hours, or until doubled in size.
9. Use the dough to make a crust for a large pizza (12 inches or more).
10. Optionally, preheat the oven to 425°F and bake for 20 minutes on a perforated pizza pan.
11. Top with desired toppings, such as sautéed onions and cooked sliced potatoes.
12. Turn off the heat when finished cooking.
